query:
INSERT INTO prompts
SET
  token = ?,
  prompt_type = ?,

  maybe_creator_user_token = ?,
  
  maybe_model_type = ?,
  maybe_generation_provider = ?,

  maybe_positive_prompt = ?,
  maybe_negative_prompt = ?,

  maybe_generation_mode = ?,
  maybe_aspect_ratio = ?,
  maybe_resolution = ?,
  maybe_batch_count = ?,
  maybe_generate_audio = ?,
  maybe_duration_seconds = ?,

  maybe_other_args = ?,

  creator_ip_address = ?
